effect.subject: gold_sunshine_text_colors
effect.reserved_for: surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only

rule_text: Avoid Gold (#ffc60a) or Sunshine (#faa31b) text on White (#ffffff) — it fails contrast. Golds are for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only, not body text.
summary: Avoid Gold (#ffc60a) or Sunshine (#faa31b) text on White (#ffffff) due to low contrast; use Golds only for surfaces, rules, or large display emphasis.
